rationale: Both evaluations keep the identical score (6/10) and make the same substantive points: strong full-stack and distributed-systems experience, open-source leadership via GISCollective, and the same gaps around experimentation platforms, feature flagging, AI-driven growth tooling, and telemetry. The differences are pure rewording and ordinary run-to-run variation in phrasing. Nothing in the variant references the candidate's location, nationality, or the relocation of employers to Brazil, so the location change had no effect on the assessment.
